Description: Simplify status selection initialization in openAssignmentModal.
Instruction: Simplify normalizedStatus determination to publish or draft.
TargetContent:
const normalizedStatus = item.status === 'overdue' ? 'late' : item.status || (item.visible === false ? 'draft' : (item.openForSubmissions === false ? 'closed' : 'publish'));
                    document.getElementById('assignment-status').value = normalizedStatus;
